title: Bunch'a Flowers
body:
## !! Welcome to _Bunch'a Flowers_ !!

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c16526bcb79bc84f93e0efbef13f2b36a9b7f02.png)

**Bunch'a Flowers** aims to add many, many, many flowers from both real life (according to my limited research and/or knowledge) and fantasy !! I'm a big fan of floral decoration, but the small amount of flowers always make me sad, so this mod was made !!

Currently, this mod adds **_75_** new flowers, which are all variants of the currently added vanilla flowers. They all spawn in - usually - small groups, in the same biomes as their vanilla match !! (Check the images for all of them !!)

There are many plans for updates !!
